overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit commercial plazas, outdoor dining areas, and an underpass with graffiti. The scene transitions from a covered shopping area with large digital billboards to an open plaza beneath an overpass, ending at a tunnel entrance with red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with large digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts down from looking up at billboards to forward walking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered plaza beneath towering digital advertisements

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying animated advertisement with clown figure in red
vertical digital billboard with purple neon imagery
linear array of bright yellow-white lights along the ceiling structure
illuminated food stall facade with menu displays and neon edging
transparent glass barrier on upper level walkway with metal frames

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at massive digital billboards in a covered cyberpunk plaza. The camera walks forward through a commercial area with wet tiled floors reflecting neon lights, passing food stalls and glass railings while maintaining a steady pace beneath the glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area under canopy with food service

events.description: entering outdoor dining area with tables, chairs, and umbrellas
passing closely by seated diners at outdoor tables

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor dining tables where NPCs are seated under umbrellas

notable_agents.action: seated at outdoor table under blue umbrella, facing away from camera
standing behind food service counter, appearing to work

entered.detail: large blue umbrella canopy with 'KRAVSH KING' text covering dining tables
round metal tables with stools arranged under the canopy
continuous strip of cyan neon light running along the base of the food counter

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered dining area beneath a glass roof. The camera walks past tables and stools under a large blue 'KRAVSH KING' canopy where NPCs are seated. Cyan neon lighting illuminates the floor along the food counter as the camera moves through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass plaza with benches and graffiti walls

events.description: exiting covered dining area into open plaza beneath overpass
approaching tunnel entrance with intense red neon lighting becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza under an overpass toward a neon-lit tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: sitting alone on orange bench looking at phone
walking toward the tunnel entrance ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead with metal railings and support beams
row of illuminated orange benches with people sitting, surrounded by planters
red brick wall covered in yellow and orange graffiti tags and street art
dark tunnel opening illuminated by intense red and pink neon lights from within
red and white metal barricades stacked near the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered area into an open plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment features wet asphalt, orange illuminated benches, and a prominent red brick wall covered in graffiti. As the camera advances, it approaches a tunnel entrance glowing with red neon light, passing scattered pedestrians and debris on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered commercial plaza into an open, gritty urban underpass. It begins beneath massive digital billboards, gliding across wet tiled floors that reflect the glow of overhead advertisements and passing food stalls. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a semi-covered dining area where the lighting turns a vivid cyan beneath a large blue canopy and glass roof. The environment then opens up into a wide plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from polished tiles to wet asphalt and orange-lit benches. Finally, the camera moves past a graffiti-covered red brick wall and scattered debris, heading directly toward a tunnel entrance bathed in deep red neon light.
